name: Swing Theory Indoor Golf
address: 50 S De Lacey Ave #200, Pasadena, CA 91105
about: Swing Theory Indoor Golf is a premier indoor golf venue featuring 3 open bays and 1 private bay. The facility utilizes state-of-the-art UNEEKOR launch monitors and GSPro simulation software with Full High Definition Cinema Resolution graphics on 4K TVs, providing a high-tech practice and playing environment. It operates with membership-based pricing options and offers services for events, lessons, and individual practice sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium UNEEKOR launch monitor provides 24 data points for detailed swing analysis
GSPro software delivers stunning, lifelike graphics with unrivaled game physics
Flexible booking system and availability for members and tee time reservations
Private bay option for focused practice sessions or small group events

food_and_drink.notes: No information provided on food service. BYOB policy is not explicitly mentioned.
No information provided on alcohol service. BYOB policy is not explicitly mentioned.

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided for rental. It is recommended to bring your own clubs or contact the venue for details on club availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention a Bring Your Own Beverage (BYOB) policy or any food service options. It is advisable to contact the venue directly for clarification on external food and drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to complete 18 holes. The standard membership includes 1 hour of play per day, which is typically sufficient for 9 holes. For more details on 18-hole duration, please contact Swing Theory directly.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information on child-friendly features or junior programs mentioned on the website. While it may be suitable for families, details regarding amenities for children are not provided.
